⚡ Free · Fast · Private

Your everyday Toolbox

9 tools for calculations and image editing — all free, all in your browser.

🧮 Calculators

⚖️Calc

BMI Calculator

Calculate your Body Mass Index instantly and understand what it means for your health.

🎂Calc

Age Calculator

Find your exact age in years, months, days, hours, and even seconds.

%Calc

Percentage Calculator

Calculate percentages, percentage change, and what percent one number is of another.

🏦Calc

EMI / Loan Calculator

Calculate your monthly loan EMI, total interest payable, and full amortization schedule.

📈Calc

Compound Interest Calculator

See the power of compound interest and how your investments grow over time.

🖼️ Image Tools

🗜️Image

Image Compressor

Compress images in your browser with zero uploads — privacy-first, client-side only.

↔️Image

Resize Image

Resize images to exact dimensions or by percentage, all in your browser.

🔄Image

Image Converter

Convert images between PNG, JPEG, and WebP formats instantly in your browser.

✂️Image

Remove Background

Remove image backgrounds instantly using client-side edge detection.

🔒 100% client-side. All tools run in your browser. No accounts, no tracking, no data collection.

Toolbox © 2026 — Free tools, no tracking, no signup.
